title: ST-001: Getting Started with SerhiiTest
body: Welcome to the SerhiiTest datasource. This is the first test document. It contains basic onboarding information for new team members. Contact: serhii@serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal for any questions.
author: serhii@serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal

title: ST-002: API Reference Overview
body: This document covers the core API endpoints available in the SerhiiTest environment. Base URL: api.serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal. Authentication: Bearer token via header. Rate limit: 100 requests per minute. Contact: api-support@serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal.
author: serhii@serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal

title: ST-003: Deployment Checklist
body: Before deploying to production in SerhiiTest environment: 1) Run all unit tests via 'npm test'. 2) Check build passes in CI at ci.serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal. 3) Create a release tag in GitLab. 4) Notify the team in #serhiitest-deploys Slack channel. Contact: devops@serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal.
author: serhii@serhii.devlab.capgemini.internal
